no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: This bead still spans multiple distinct implementation slices that are not safely landable as one execute-pass at the current decomposition depth: stop-condition classification and cost-cap routing, no-progress accounting, pre-close review repair-cycle orchestration, execution trace schema, and the associated regression tests. The current worktree already contains some adjacent pieces (strict review verdict parsing and review cost charging), but the requested stop/repair/trace behavior is not present. Because this bead is already at decomposition depth 2, I cannot split it further here without violating the cap. It needs a new governing bead or a revised, narrower contract before implementation.
